# Password negative corpus — should NOT trigger

password=<YOUR_PASSWORD> (template placeholder)
password=changeme (common placeholder)
password=example (placeholder)
password=placeholder
password=null
password=undefined
password=none
password=xxx (too short)
password=abc (too short, 3 chars)
password=12345 (too short, 5 chars)
# Example: password=secrethere

The password field is required

password reset link sent
password strength: strong
password must be 8+ characters
forgotten password recovery
password policy requires uppercase
password complexity rules enforce 12+ characters minimum
